description: Red bag with branding on the front and one long adjustable shoulder strap for carrying easeOne small pocket on the front with a flap and a press buttoned closure and one big pocket on the front with a magnetic buttoned closureOne large zippered compartment with an inner zippered compartment to stash away essentials One zippered roomy compartment at the backBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and a brand tab on the side
